title: Scan scripts use -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue on module imports masking CommandNotFoundException
description: Multiple scan scripts import PwShGUICore.psm1 with '-ErrorAction SilentlyContinue' and a bare catch block (e.g. Invoke-PSEnvironmentScanner.ps1 line 56). If the module import fails, subsequent calls to module functions like Write-AppLog will throw System.Management.Automation.CommandNotFoundException. The silent suppression makes root cause diagnosis extremely difficult — the user sees 'CommandNotFoundException: Write-AppLog is not recognized' but the real cause is a failed module import. This pattern appears in at least 3 scan scripts.
detection_method: Code review of module import patterns across all scan scripts

attempts.notes: No automated fix. Remedy instructions: No remedy defined
Known fix available (FIX-202604050440-1713: Auto-detected resolution of unknown at C:\PowerShellGUI\scripts\QUICK-APP\FOLDER-ROOT\Install-ModulesList.ps1:?). Manual application required.
